content: These criteria scored 95%+ on first attempt and don't discriminate quality — consider making them harder or removing: journal_entry_anomaly_detection, benfords_law_statistical_precision, revenue_timing_manipulation_mechanics, timeline_reconstruction_precision, saas_metrics_forensic_indicators, financial_impact_quantification_precision, evidence_documentation_deficiencies, accounting_standard_citation_accuracy, analytical_procedure_execution_rigor, internal_control_deficiency_analysis, data_analytics_tool_application, memo_professional_communication_standards, red_flag_indicator_sophistication
task: Write a forensic accounting memo analyzing suspected revenue manipulation at a mid-market SaaS company. Include journal entry analysis, Benfords Law testing, timeline reconstruction, and quantified financial impact.
